data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for native payment processors (Stripe, Square, PayPal) but did not provide any evidence confirming their integration. The linked use case explicitly states the need for 'Payment processors (Stripe, Square, PayPal) - native', yet there is no supporting evidence or API reads that demonstrate this functionality. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the implementation regarding the required payment processor integrations.
gaps: No evidence of native integration with payment processors Stripe, Square, or PayPal.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
